steps.title: Use the line of best fit
steps.content: The question asks for the predicted value at $x=1{,}200$, so read from the line of best fit rather than from an individual data point.

steps.title: Read the predicted y-value
steps.content: At $x=1{,}200$, the line is between $10$ and $12$ on the $y$-axis, closest to $11$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The predicted value is $11$, which matches C. The distractors correspond to a larger $x$-value or give predictions that are too high or too low for $x=1200$.
